data.body:
Today we mark 81 years since the liberation of the Bergen-Belsen concentration camp (15/4/1945). Of the 60,000 survivors, ~28,000 perished in the 1st few weeks, ravaged by disease & malnutrition. The survivors were forced to stay in the camp until 1951.
#holocaust #genocide #history #ww2 #shoah
